_meta.purpose: Top-10 table COUNT(*) baseline for monthly R2 restore drill (DEEP-62, scripts/cron/restore_drill_monthly.py).
_meta.skip_semantics: Missing file -> status='skip' silent degrade (defect C of R8_BACKUP_RESTORE_DRILL_AUDIT). This file resolves that.
_meta.extraction_method: sqlite3 SELECT COUNT(*) FROM <tbl>; read-only against local snapshot, production DB write 0.
_meta.rotation: Even months -> autonomath sample, odd months -> jpintel sample (cron rotates by month parity).
_meta.review_cadence: Refresh after major migrations; growth >10% requires bumping baseline to avoid false drift alerts.
